{{CargoRelic
|name=Bamboo Copter
|class_id=20300
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is a headgear enabling the wearer to fly and control the flight mentally. The propeller actually generates an anti-gravity field around the body to lift the user off the ground. Emm, the air is so fresh here!
|fame=20
|art=15
|fth=12
|civ=16
|tech=27
|ss1=Per new Realm entered, Snail RUSH +5<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss2=Per new Realm entered, Snail RUSH +10<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss3=Per new Realm entered, Snail RUSH +15<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss4=Per new Realm entered, Snail RUSH +15<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss7=Per new Realm entered, Snail RUSH +15<br>Realms Reached: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
